lab.topology: single-node disposable lab, no Ceph, no existing guests
lab.auth_note: Username/password ticket auth requires a realm-qualified username such as user@realm.

test_runs.name: read-only lab smoke
test_runs.notes: Ceph test skipped because Ceph was not installed in this lab.

test_runs.name: registered MCP read tool smoke
test_runs.notes: Registered list_nodes exercised auth, RBAC, policy denial, audit, and Proxmox HTTP client paths.

test_runs.name: disposable VM mutation smoke
test_runs.notes: Created, updated, waited on Proxmox task completion, and deleted a disposable VM.

test_runs.name: registered disposable VM mutation smoke
test_runs.notes: Registered update_vm_config changed a disposable VM description and confirmed this endpoint returns no UPID task reference.

test_runs.name: LXC smoke
test_runs.notes: LXC inventory passed; template and lifecycle checks skipped because no LXC template was present on local storage.

test_runs.name: backup create/list smoke
test_runs.notes: Registered run_vm_backup returned a UPID, task tracking captured it, backup content appeared on local storage, and cleanup completed.

test_runs.name: storage profile smoke
test_runs.notes: local directory content discovery and local-lvm LVM-thin status were validated without claiming expansion or benchmark support.

test_runs.name: storage mutation smoke
test_runs.notes: Bounded benchmark preview and expansion guarded evidence were recorded; live expansion remains guarded.

test_runs.name: PBS verification gate
test_runs.notes: PBS profile was not selected and live backup verification remains unpromoted.

test_runs.name: Ceph/HA/multi-node profile gates
test_runs.notes: Current evidence is single-node without Ceph, HA, or PBS topology claims.

promoted_tools.evidence: Durable SSH session and recording contract tests for pve-9-single-node-no-ceph require database-backed stores for live console sessions.

operator_notes: Do not include usernames, passwords, API tokens, private keys, or raw credential references in this artifact.
